case_title: COURNALE & CO. VS. FODA, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COURNALE & CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FODA, INC. DBA ATMAN COMPUTER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 5860 GEARY BOULEVARD, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94121, SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FODA, INC. DBA ATMAN COMPUTER

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COURNALE & CO. AS TO DEFENDANT FODA, INC. DBA ATMAN COMPUTER DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF COURNALE & CO. SERVED FEB-26-2019, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $83.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF COURNALE & CO.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT FODA, INC. DBA ATMAN COMPUTER

DECLARATION RE LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COURNALE & CO.
